title: Grumbo Gigas.
content:
Fee! faw! fum!
	 I smell the blood of an Englishman.
	 Dead or alive, I will have some.

	    Fe! fau! fum!
	    Sanguinem odoror Anglicum.
	    Seu vivum seu mortuum,
	    Bibendum est mihi aliquantum.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Jacob Bigelow, titled "Grumbo Gigas.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
